reason_for_decision: The article is clear, technically grounded, and strong enough to pass as a Foundation entry on Remote ID without revision.
strengths: The article explains Remote ID as a cooperative broadcast layer rather than overstating it as a full traffic-management solution.
The compliance-path section gives beginners practical structure by distinguishing built-in capability, retrofit modules, and geographically bounded exceptions.
The limits section adds real decision value by separating cooperative identification from broader drone detection and authorization questions.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable for beginners, accurate on the core policy and technical idea, and useful enough to pass without revision.
